productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Purple Sweatshirt
description: CompositionPurple hooded sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has long raglan sleeves, mock chest placket with a split V-neck, stitch detailing along the placket, hood and armholes, and brand button stitched above the left hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSubtle and stylish, this purple full-sleeve hooded sweatshirt from united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The mock chest placket and stitch detailing gives this sweatshirt a unique look, while the long sleeves keep the evening chill at bay. Team it with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual lookModel statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
